chapter_title.en: Shia traditional reports on the topic that Imams are twelve in number

text: فأما ما روي من جهة الخاصة فأكثر من أن يحصى، غير أنا نذكر طرفا منها:

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: Reports narrated through Shia sources on this topic are so numerous that they cannot be computed; we mentioned only some of them here:
